title: Blue Origin CEO on Growing Satellite Launch Demands
description: Blue Origin CEO Dave Limp said the company would like to launch eight to 12 flights this year, citing unprecedented demand for launches and the growing number of satellite-based internet services and connectivity. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Revamped Siri Interface in iOS 27 Is Hidden in WWDC Teaser
description: Also: Memory shortages could push back new Macs.

title: How the AI Boom is Fueling the US Copper Race
description: As demand for electricity surges in the age of artificial intelligence, copper has become a critical input for everything from data centers to power grids. But US production has stagnated for decades, leaving the country increasingly reliant on imports even as global demand accelerates. In Arizona, projects like Rio Tinto’s Resolution mine highlight both the scale of untapped domestic resources and the challenges of bringing new supply online, from regulatory delays to rising costs. With China dominating processing and global competition intensifying, industry leaders and analysts warn that rebuilding US copper capacity is not just an economic priority, but a strategic one. (Source: Bloomberg)
